text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... My tummy growled in the middleof class...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I swear I ate breakfast. I had five<n>bread rolls,
a carrot salad...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
A carrot hamburger steak, bacon and<n>eggs...
Minestrone, and a jelly dessert...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I burned it all off while running? I<n>should
stop by the school store...
